meta.title: Zambia CDC 2024 Zambian Languages Syllabus — Structured RAG Dataset

meta.purpose: Structured curriculum data for AI-assisted quiz, lesson plan, and assessment generation. Each record maps to one embeddable chunk aligned to official CDC competences.
meta.subject: Zambian Languages
meta.extractionNote: Shift-corrected extract (detected_shift=29, confidence=0.955) + deterministic CDC table parse. No fabricated content.
